---
title: "Examples Gallery"
subtitle: "Explore what's possible with lokigi through these hands-on examples."
toc: true
listing:
  - id: sites-problem-basic
    contents:
      - "location/simple/index.ipynb"
      - "location/existing_sites/index.ipynb"
      - "location/no_geometry/index.ipynb"
      - "location/evaluating_current_baseline/index.ipynb"
      - "location/site_closures/index.ipynb"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 3
    template: ../lokigi_docs/resources/listing.ejs

  - id: sites-problem-type
    contents:
      - "location/p_median_and_p_center_variants/index.ipynb"
      - "location/mclp/index.ipynb"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 3
    template: ../lokigi_docs/resources/listing.ejs

  - id: sites-solver-type
    contents:
      - "location/larger_problems/index.ipynb"
      - "location/greedy_and_grasp/index.ipynb"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 3
    template: ../lokigi_docs/resources/listing.ejs

  - id: sites-solution-evaluation
    contents:
      - "location/equity/index.ipynb"
      - "location/comparing_solutions/index.ipynb"
      - "location/comparing_n_sites/index.ipynb"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 3
    template: ../lokigi_docs/resources/listing.ejs

  - id: sites-other
    contents:
      - "location/obtaining_travel_time_matrices/index.ipynb"
    type: grid
    sort: false
    grid-columns: 3
    template: ../lokigi_docs/resources/listing.ejs
---

## Single Objective Location Optimization

Examples relating to optimizing the combination of sites to meet a single objective - for example, minimising the average travel time of individuals to a site.

### Basic site problem examples

::: {#sites-problem-basic}
:::


### Different Problem Types

::: {#sites-problem-type}
:::


### Advanced Solver Options

When a problem is too big for evaluating and storing every combination, lokigi offers other options.

::: {#sites-solver-type}
:::

### Advanced Solution Evaluation

::: {#sites-solution-evaluation}
:::

### Other

:::{#sites-other}
:::
